pages.text: Copyrium Ore — a unique mineral found in snowy biomes, capable of temporarily copying and transferring elemental powers. Used to craft Elemental Power Generators and empty characteristic cards.

pages.title: Copyrium Ore
pages.text: Generates in snowy biomes between heights 8-64.$(br2)Smelting yields $(l)Copyrium Ingot$(), used in advanced crafting.

pages.title: Empty Characteristics Card
pages.text: Recipe:$(br)Paper + Copyrium Ingot$(br2)Recording rank and level player data.

pages.title: Elemental Power Generator
pages.text: Mechanics:$(br2)- Transfer power to player (RMB)$(br)- Reset: SHIFT+RMB
Features:$(br2)Copied elemental power:$(br)- Automatically disappears after 90 seconds$(br2)Star points regenerate within 64 blocks$(br2)Generator works in any conditions.
